title: Guamia mariannae
taxonomy: Guamia mariannae is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Guam and is considered an endangered species. The plant is a shrub or vine and is known for its unique appearance. I was unable to find any information about the specific classification beyond its family, but it is likely to be classified further into a genus and species within the Rubiaceae family.
